value="Workers<br>(Server)" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="622.5" y="-370" width="65" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-29" value="Bindings<br>(Optional)" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="-800" width="120" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-30" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=-0.008;entryY=0.162;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;exitX=0.98;exitY=0.373;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" parent="1" source="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-16" target="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-28" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-31" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=-0.022;entryY=0.385;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" parent="1" source="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-16" target="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-28" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="529" y="-598" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="609" y="-689" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-33" style="rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=-0.022;entryY=0.765;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;exitX=0.98;exitY=0.653;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" parent="1" source="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-16" target="S6ZGtU122QFlLBz-IGup-28" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="530" y="-590" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="607" y="-591" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-1" value="" style="strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;dashed=0;align=center;html=1;shape=mxgraph.mockup.containers.browserWindow;rSize=0;strokeColor2=#008cff;strokeColor3=#c4c4c4;mainText=,;recursiveResize=0;strokeColor=none;fillColor=default;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="760" y="-750" width="550" height="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-2" value="Home - IANT" style="strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;dashed=0;align=center;html=1;shape=mxgraph.mockup.containers.anchor;fontSize=17;fontColor=#666666;align=left;whiteSpace=wrap;" parent="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="12" width="110" height="26" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-3" value="https://iant.com" style="strokeWidth=1;shadow=0;dashed=0;align=center;html=1;shape=mxgraph.mockup.containers.anchor;rSize=0;fontSize=17;fontColor=#666666;align=left;" parent="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="130" y="60" width="250" height="26" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W8Ir4n3pc9SkSrj4FrCb-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="710" y="-559.96" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="760" y="-560" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="9B9JC_OEUGiKKgfaOZvz" name="Sequential Diagram"> <mxGraphModel dx="2760" dy="1520" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="700" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="gejOWuutw_LzTa_XZSUk-47" value="Text" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="1590" width="50" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram\n autonumber\n actor Dev as User (Prompt: \"Update Home Page\")\n participant AI as CF Workers AI (Llama 3.2)\n participant R2 as CF R2 Storage\n participant GH as GitHub API\n participant GHA as GitHub Actions\n participant Preview as CF Pages (Preview)\n participant Lead as Approver (Human)\n participant Prod as CF Pages (Prod)\n\n Note over Dev, AI: Step 1: AI Discovery & Upload\n Dev->>AI: Image + \"Update home page\"\n AI->>R2: Upload image\n R2-->>AI: Public URL: r2.dev/new_img.png\n \n Note over AI, GH: Step 2: Intelligent Repository Search\n AI->>GH: GET /repos/contents (List files)\n GH-->>AI: File list [README.md, src/, public/]\n AI->>GH: GET /repos/contents/src/pages (Search pages)\n GH-->>AI: [index.astro, about.astro]\n Note right of AI: AI identifies \"index.astro\" as \"Home\"\n \n Note over AI, GH: Step 3: Propose Change (Branch/PR)\n AI->>GH: Create branch 'ai-update-homepage'\n AI->>GH: Commit updated <img> to index.astro\n AI->>GH: Open Pull Request (PR #1)\n \n Note over GH, Preview: Step 4: Preview Build\n GH->>GHA: Trigger on Pull Request\n GHA->>Preview: Build & Deploy Astro\n Preview-->>GH: Post Preview URL in PR comments\n\n Note over Lead, Preview: Step 5: Human Review\n Lead->>Preview: Inspect \"Home Page\" visual changes\n \n alt Deny\n Lead-->>GH: Request changes / Close PR\n else Approve\n Lead->>GH: Merge PR #1 to main\n GH->>GHA: Trigger Production Deploy\n GHA->>Prod: Push to Cloudflare Pages (Live)\n end\n"
}" id="gejOWuutw_LzTa_XZSUk-49"> <mxCell style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=1;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-149" width="2263" height="1699" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> <diagram id="eDZa48k9Ko_Rr0TuGlRQ" name="Migration Plan"> <mxGraphModel dx="628" dy="461" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="700" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="szCR5fwuE1Zmd1Z3Kvnl-5" value="<ul><li>We will have full control of our infrastructure via CloudFlare login</li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">CloudFlare will be used as our hosting services for static pages and media files</span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">GitHub will be our of source of truth for code and configurations</span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">GitHub actions will be used to push updates to CloudFlare Pages</span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">All pages and redirects will be maintained in the CloudFlare&nbsp;<br></span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">Admin pages will be added and will be behind Google Workspace SSO</span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">Secrets can be stored in CF Secrets Store</span></li><li><span style="text-align: center; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">Documentation will be created to show how to create or update pages and media files</span></li></ul>" style="text;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=middle;overflow=hidden;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="89" y="46" width="513" height="141" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
